title: BEM-973 regex SHA patch
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text()
pattern = r"commit_sha\s*=\s*os\.environ\.get\('COMMIT_SHA',\s*''\)"
replacement = "commit_sha = os.environ.get('COMMIT_SHA', '') or os.environ.get('GITHUB_SHA', '')"
new_text, count = re.subn(pattern, replacement, text, count=1)
if count:
    p.write_text(new_text)
    changed_files.append(str(p))
    ops_applied.append('bem973_regex_sha_assignment_patch')
else:
    ops_applied.append('bem973_regex_no_match')
diag = Path('governance/reports/BEM973_REGEX_SHA_ASSIGNMENT_PATCH_DIAG.txt')
diag.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
diag.write_text('replace_count=' + str(count) + '\npattern=' + pattern + '\n')
changed_files.append(str(diag))
"""
Create file governance/reports/BEM973_REGEX_SHA_ASSIGNMENT_PATCH.md with content BEM-973 | REGEX SHA ASSIGNMENT PATCH | 2026-05-31 | 15:16 (UTC+3)

⚠️ If replace_count=1, next BEM-974 verifies non-null SHA.
❌ No release PASS.
